keywords.name: I am Vladruc Urghain. Welcome to my house!
keywords.job: I am a humble merchant of little importance to the beautiful Venore.
keywords.thais: Sadly only through books I have come to know your great Thais, and to know her is to love her.
keywords.books: These companions have been good friends and teachers to me.
keywords.adventure: The time I sought out adventure is long gone indeed.
keywords.Tibia: What a wonderful world we do live in ... so full of life.
keywords.shop: Ah, feel free to browse and buy in my humble shop below.
keywords.market: Ah, feel free to browse and buy in my humble shop below.
keywords.king: I am of noble blood myself. I have been so long master that none other should be master of me.
keywords.tibianus: I am of noble blood myself. I have been so long master that none other should be master of me.
keywords.venore: Our ways are not your ways, and there shall be to you many strange things.
keywords.army: The Thaian garrsion serves its purpose very well.
keywords.ferumbras: You think he is of ancient evil? Little you know about ancientness or evilness.
keywords.excalibug: A terrifying weapon if it does exist at all.
keywords.news: I am a reclusive person and learn little of the local gossip of the peasants.
keywords.help: I am sorry, but I can't be of much assistance to you.
keywords.monster: Oh yes, the children of the night ... you dwellers in the city cannot enter into the feelings of the hunter.
keywords.dungeon: Such lovely places, unjustly shunned by the people.
keywords.vampire: Please don't talk about such creatures. You are scaring me.
keywords.thanks: That's nothing worth to be mentioned.
keywords.thank: That's nothing worth to be mentioned.
keywords.you: That's nothing worth to be mentioned.
keywords.offer: Please check my humble market downstairs for the wares that are offered.
keywords.magic: Magic is a tool to be mastered.
keywords.spells: I know a spell or two. You might want to buy some spells downstairs in the market.
keywords.alchemy: You can buy some potions downstairs.
keywords.blood: I like blood ... only the color, that is, of course ... <chuckles>
keywords.undead: It is not dead, which can eternal lie, and in strange aeons, even death may die.
keywords.necroman: Death is the final frontier. Necromancers boldly go, where no one has gone before.
keywords.coffin: The final restingplace for all of us, isn't it?

texts: I am Vladruc Urghain and welcome you, , to my house.
I am a humble merchant of little importance to the beautiful Venore.

greetingPatterns.response: I am Vladruc Urghain and welcome you, %N, to my house.
